_meta.status_note: 36 of 39 candidates verified against primary sources as of 2026-07-15 -- 26 KTB/BLS (see prior notes) plus 10 InnovestX (CMBANK23, SENSE23, HORIZON23, KINGSOFT23, UBTECH23, SOFTBANK23, TEL23, KEYENCE23, SANRIO23, SUSHI23), all confirmed by rendering dr23.innovestx.co.th's product pages with headless Chrome ('google-chrome --headless=new --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=8000 <url>') since the SPA returns an empty shell to a plain HTTP fetch -- the ratio lives in a field labeled 'อัตราแปลงสภาพ'. Every one of the 10 was cross-checked against live DR/underlying/FX prices (implied ratio within 0.1-3.6% of the scraped value, all within normal DR premium/discount range) before being trusted. This also resolved SOFTBANK23's earlier three-way ratio conflict: the live page shows 527.5:1, matching the previously-unconfirmed secondary claim and the DR's own listing_date (2026-01-05), so 2110:1 (the original Nov-2025 announcement) was superseded by a ratio adjustment on that date. Remaining unresolved: 005930.KS (Samsung) and 2330.TW (TSMC) -- no real SET DR ticker found, both 404 on Yahoo, not an InnovestX/KTB/BLS product at all. HUAHONG23.BK (Hua Hong Semiconductor, InnovestX) -- real DR, ratio could be fetched the same way if needed, but currently excluded for a different reason: only 26 history_rows, below MIN_DR_HISTORY=60 (too newly listed).

alternatives.verified_note: Ratio 1:100 confirmed via SET Information Memorandum (issuer KTB, 'General Document Number 7'); ticker/issuer confirmed on set.or.th company-profile. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
Ratio 1:100 ('1 Toyota share : DR 100 units') confirmed on krungthai.com's own TOYOTA80 product page; ticker/issuer confirmed on set.or.th company-profile. Reviewed 2026-07-14.

Ratio 1:1200 confirmed on bualuang.co.th's own ASML01 product page (first trading date 16 Nov 2023, matches discovered listing_date); ticker/issuer confirmed on set.or.th quote page. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
Ratio 1:100 ('1 Alibaba share to 100 DR units') confirmed via SET's own listing news release (set.or.th mediacenter, article BABA80); issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
Ratio 1:100 ('1 Baidu share to 100 DR units') confirmed via search of krungthai.com's BIDU80 product page; issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
Ratio 1:100 confirmed via official KTB factsheet PDF table ('อัตราอ้างอิงของตราสาร (สินทรัพย์อ้างอิง : DR) = 1 : 100'). Reviewed 2026-07-14.

Ratio 1:100 inferred from TradingView security description 'Units Thailand Depositery Receipts Repr 0.01 Sh' (0.01 share/unit = 100 units/share), issuer KTB confirmed via krungthai.com product page. Reviewed 2026-07-14. Note: TradingView-tag inference is a weaker source than an explicit SET/issuer ratio statement — worth a follow-up spot-check.
Ratio 1:100 confirmed on krungthai.com's own NETEASE80 product page ('1 หุ้น : DR 100 หน่วย', cross-checked against its own price-example table); issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-15.
Ratio 1:1000 confirmed via two independent search hits: explicit '1 underlying share to 1,000 DR units' statement and TradingView tag 'Repr 0.001 Sh'; issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14.

Ratio 1:10 inferred from TradingView security description 'Repr 0.1 Sh' (0.1 share/unit = 10 units/share); issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14. Note: an earlier search snippet said 'conversion ratio of 10 to 1' which is ambiguous phrasing for the same fact -- flag for a follow-up spot-check against the factsheet PDF if this DR is ever sized heavily.

Ratio 1:10 confirmed on krungthai.com's own ZIJIN80 product page ('1 หุ้น : DR 10 หน่วย'); issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14. This directly contradicts the naive 'Repr 0.01 Sh' TradingView-tag guess (which would imply 1:100) -- do not trust that tag alone, see mapping.json _meta.status_note.
Ratio 1:100 inferred from TradingView security description 'Repr 0.01 Sh'; issuer KTB. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
